a plain-English chart reader

Natal Chart & Work Synastry Calculator

Enter a birth date, time, and place to get a plain-language read of someone's natal chart — what each planet means about how they show up. Then add a second person to see how the two of you work together (from a working/collaboration angle, not a romance angle).

Birth details
If you don't know the time, use 12:00 — Sun/most planets stay accurate; Moon & rising will be rough.
Timezone is detected automatically from the birth location and date (including historical DST). No data leaves your browser besides geocoding + timezone lookups.
Person A
Person B

Want a deeper read or a consultation?

If you'd like a personal interpretation, have questions about your chart, or want to book a consultation — send me a note. I'll reply to the email you enter below.

For self-reflection and curiosity, not a substitute for a professional astrology reading. Planetary positions are computed locally in your browser using the astronomy-engine library (accuracy comparable to Swiss Ephemeris, ~1 arcminute).

When you look up a city, the city name is sent to OpenStreetMap Nominatim (geocoding) and the resulting coordinates are sent to timeapi.io (timezone lookup). Both are anonymous and cached locally in your browser for 30 days. No birth data is stored or shared by this site.
